default.name: TRESR High-Contrast Vector Style
default.description: Bold, stylized graphic designs for TRESR merch. Clean vector artwork with high visual contrast. Designs feature lifestyle and culture themes in white or accent colors on a solid black background.

visualCharacteristics.lineQuality: Smooth vector transitions, no jagged or pixelated edges

designDirectives.balance: Maintain visual balance between design weight and negative space
designDirectives.sizing: Fits within a square composition; edge-to-edge minimal margin

coffee.name: Coffee Culture Typography Style
coffee.description: Bold typography and coffee-related graphics. High energy, caffeine-powered aesthetic.

lifestyle.name: Modern Lifestyle Minimalist
lifestyle.description: Clean minimalist designs for lifestyle themes. Relatable, shareable content.

vintage.name: Vintage Distressed Graphic
vintage.description: Retro distressed graphics with nostalgic appeal. Worn, vintage aesthetic.

promptTemplate.basePrompt: Create a standalone graphic artwork for screen printing on apparel.
criticalRequirements: Solid black background (#000000) - the background will be removed
NO t-shirt, NO clothing, NO mockup, NO model, NO person wearing anything
Just the isolated graphic design centered in the image
Bold, clear design that works at any size
White design elements on black background
promptTemplate.outputFormat: Square composition, centered, edge-to-edge with minimal margin
